goal: Kaelen must understand his new body, environment, and the 'rules' of this brutal world to ensure immediate survival.
conflict: The immediate shock of rebirth, physical weakness, and the overwhelming sensory input of the ash-choked, desolate landscape.
turn: Kaelen's perfect memory and analytical mind rapidly catalog the dire situation, shifting him from disoriented to cold, calculating assessment, realizing this is a world of cultivation and raw survival.

exit_state.kaelen_scarred_architect: Calculating, grimly determined, perfectly aware of his dire new reality
